events.summary: C3 Phase 0 (Research) initialized. Research.md authored (12 sections: surface design + search algorithm + filter taxonomy + entry points + out-of-scope guards + 3 design decisions + 6 success metrics + 4 kill criteria + 4 new analytics events + Phase E discipline). Branch: feature/exercise-search-filter. Scope: read-only ExerciseLibraryView sheet on top of TrainingProgramData.allExercises (~50 exercises). Companion to C6 (mutable surface). Phase E compliant.

Phase 0 (Research) approved (operator: 'continue with D1, C6 and C3'). Phase 1 PRD at docs/product/prd/exercise-search-filter.md (~370 lines). Phase 0 §7 chip-component question RESOLVED: AppPickerChip + AppFilterBar exist; no new primitive. Picker-mode init signature defined for C6 reuse: ExerciseLibraryView(picker: ((ExerciseDefinition) -> Void)? = nil). 4 new training_-prefixed analytics events. 6 success metrics T1/T2/T3 + 4 kill criteria + 6 OQ resolved. ~600 LoC est.

Phase 1 PRD approved (operator marked PR #573 ready + 'continue'). Phase 2 Tasks at .claude/features/exercise-search-filter/tasks.md — 10 discrete tasks T1-T10 with dependency graph + LoC estimates ~875 total. 7-commit Phase 4 landing order: T1+T2 infra > T3+T4 row+detail > T5 sheet > T6+T7 entry > T9 tests > T10 case-study. ~3-4h estimated. Out-of-scope guards 5 explicit. Phase E compliant.
